name: 折叠刀（★） | 人工染色
descriptionEn: Flip knives sport a Persian-style back-swept blade with an acute point. While the point itself may be fragile, the overall design of the flip knife's design is surprisingly durable. It has been given a forced patina using lemon and mustard dripped onto the surface. If you think it's messy now, wait until you see it under a blacklight
descriptionZh: 具有波斯风格的折叠刀有着锋利的后弯刀片。虽然刀的尖端较易破碎，但从折叠刀的整体设计来看，它出奇的耐用。 通过将柠檬汁和芥末滴到这把武器的表面，它被人工地附上了氧化层。 你也许以为刀刃上一团糟，请在黑光灯源下瞧瞧吧
